title: nephrodium lazazaburii
intro: Nephrodium lazazaburii is a species of extinct fern, belonging to the family Matonia, with some sources suggesting its classification under the family Blechnaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Nephrodium lazazaburii include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its possible use as an antiseptic to prevent wound infections. However, due to its extinction, Nephrodium lazazaburii is no longer used in herbal preparations, but its historical significance and potential medicinal properties remain of interest in the fields of botany and traditional medicine.
